title: firstrun.complete
description: Mark the first-run wizard as completed. MUST only succeed when the wizard is in_progress and the Raw step has at least one RegisteredSource. Sets FirstRunState.completed_at, clears the sources_buffer, and is mirrored to the localStorage completion flag by the desktop adapter.

completed_at.description: Server-local time the wizard was marked complete.

registered_source_count.description: Total RegisteredSource rows at completion time, included for caller convenience.

wizard.not.in.progress.description: FirstRunState is already completed_at != null. The caller should refresh state rather than re-completing.

required.step.incomplete.description: No RegisteredSource of kind 'raw' exists. The wizard MUST register at least one Raw source before completion.
